summary: Product page for the Simple Ride Mask Without Ears, a transparent UV-protective fly mask that shields a horse's eyes from insects, dust and debris.
Cavallo community roundup (March/April 2019) highlighting friends like Emma Massingale and her tricycle trip across Europe with miniature horses.
Carole Herder's post admitting Cavallo's hoof pad plastic packaging was a mistake and announcing a move to eliminate plastic from pad packaging.
Customer reviews roundup (March/April 2019) sharing testimonials from Cavallo Trek and CLB hoof boot owners, including laminitis rehab and trail use.
Feature on natural horsemanship leader Emma Massingale's custom tricycle journey across Europe with her dog and two untrained miniature horses.
Reflective post using Solomon Asch's conformity experiment to encourage horse owners to choose adventure and their own beliefs over peer pressure.
In-depth guide on how Cavallo hoof boots aid therapy, rehab and turnout for laminitis, founder, navicular, abscesses, white line disease and other hoof conditions.
Community link roundup pointing to magazine articles, newsletters and features (We Ride Sport & Trail, Trailmeister, Equi-Ads, Joe Camp) involving Cavallo.
Carole Herder explains what white line disease is and how horse owners can recognize hoof anatomy and maintain healthy hooves.
Carole Herder's advice on keeping horse hooves hydrated and healthy during hot, dry weather and avoiding cracks and abscesses from sudden moisture changes.
Customer testimonial roundup featuring Cavallo Trek and CLB reviews, including the Horse Trail Chicks review and a laminitic mini named Valentine.
Carole Herder's article on five climate change issues affecting horses, covering wildfire smoke, heat, drought and respiratory health in British Columbia.
